title: Brotein data model
html:
Stub. Supabase schema (public) backing Brotein — 13+ tables across foods (food_categories, food_items, restaurants, restaurant_items), users + social (users, profiles, friendships, invites), gamification (protein_logs, user_stats, daily_quotes), and growth (access_codes, access_redemptions, creator_attributions, api_rate_limits). Most tables shipped Unrestricted (no RLS) circa Aug 2025.

Synthesized in

  • 2026-04-27 — brotein as rankett prototype (cited in synthesis)
